title: Machine Learning Foundations
desc: A hands-on workshop covering the fundamentals of machine learning and practical applications.

title: Data Visualization with Tableau
desc: Learn to create compelling visualizations and dashboards using Tableau.

title: Introduction to Data Science
desc: Our inaugural event introducing the core concepts of data science to students.

title: Python for Data Analysis Bootcamp
desc: An intensive bootcamp focused on using Python libraries like Pandas and NumPy for data manipulation.

title: SQL for Beginners
desc: A beginner-friendly session on writing SQL queries for data extraction and analysis from relational databases.

title: Tech Talk: Data in the Cloud
desc: An invited talk from an industry expert on cloud computing services for data storage and processing.

title: Career Session: Resume Building
desc: Workshop on how to build a data-science-focused resume that stands out to recruiters.

title: Git & GitHub for Beginners
desc: Learn version control essentials with Git and how to collaborate on projects using GitHub.

title: Student-Alumni Networking Mixer
desc: An evening for students to connect with alumni working in the data industry and learn from their experiences.
